title: Hast Shipyards
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hast Shipyards''' were a major [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] and repair center at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hast]] which specialized in repairing damaged warships for combat duty. The yards were maintained as a secret yard for high-profile projects.

==History==
The Hast Shipyards were chosen for a major refit and repair for the New Republic [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] ''[[Emancipator]]'' and [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']]. However, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents discovered the location of the shipyards. Shortly thereafter, a large Imperial fleet [[Battle of the Hast Shipyards|attacked the yards]]. It inflicted severe damage: besides heavy damage to the pair of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], twenty [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]], five [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], and seven [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruisers]] were put out of commission. This attack delayed plans for a major New Republic offensive, as well as forcing the new government to divert resources to repairing the numerous damaged ships instead of constructing new ones.

The yards were eventually repaired, serving as one of the locations to build the [[MC90 Star Cruiser]]. This gave the yards some distinction: besides the main yards at [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], the only other location capable of constructing these new cruisers was [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].
